entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `amount` REAL NOT NULL, `tag` TEXT NOT NULL, `note` TEXT, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_records_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_records_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`timestamp`)

indices.name: index_records_type
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_records_type` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`type`)

indices.name: index_records_tag
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_records_tag` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`tag`)
